calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 18, 2019 is admitted to probate. Jonathan R. Friedman is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 15, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-12-2021 Continued To May-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
